title: James Sharpe's Contributions to Neurology and Neuro-ophthalmology: A Posthumous Tribute 10 Years On.
abstract: Dr. Sharpe was a leading eye movement researcher who had also been the editor of this journal. We wish to mark the 10th anniversary of his death by providing a sense of what he had achieved through some examples of his research.
journal: The Canadian journal of neurological sciences. Le journal canadien des sciences neurologiques
